issues.description: AC-004 test 'test_semantic_search_ranking_with_real_embeddings' was SKIPPED, not executed. Test output shows '15 passed, 1 skipped in 23.30s'. The test skips when FLEET_MEMORY_EMBED_URL environment variable is not set. A skipped test is an absent oracle and does not prove the 'real nomic round-trip' as required by the criterion.
issues.requirement: AC-004: Ranking: with memories about 'database connection pooling' and 'holiday rota planning' stored, asearch('how do we manage Postgres connections') ranks the pooling memory first and every result carries a relevance score (real nomic round-trip proven)
issues.suggestion: Configure FLEET_MEMORY_EMBED_URL in the test environment to enable real nomic embedding execution, OR if the embedding service cannot be made available in the ephemeral test environment, consult with the task author to clarify whether a correctly-written conditional test (that skips when service unavailable) satisfies the 'proven' requirement.

issues.description: Turn 2 feedback requested updating the report generator to filter orchestrator-managed paths from files_modified/files_created/implementation_files. Six files are still incorrectly claimed: coverage_integration.json, test_integration_output.txt, tests/integration/conftest.py, tests/integration/test_pool_lifecycle.py, tests/integration/test_store_semantics.py, tests/unit/test_app_lifespan.py. Honesty verification shows 'should_fix' severity for each.
issues.suggestion: Filter orchestrator-managed paths (.guardkit/autobuild/, coverage*.json, test_*_output.txt) and files not modified this turn from the Player report's files_modified, files_created, and implementation_files arrays. If delegating to task-work, ensure the delegation includes instructions to produce an accurate file manifest.

criteria_verification.notes: pytest -m integration passes with 15 passed, 1 skipped in 23.30s. Seam test 'test_ephemeral_dsn_is_local_random_port' validates DSN is local (127.0.0.1 or localhost, port != 5432). No NAS DSN references found. All tests use ephemeral_pg fixture.
Test 'test_round_trip_preserves_content_and_timestamps' passed. Verifies aput→aget returns byte-identical content, created_at and updated_at are present and within 5 seconds of current time.

Upsert test 'test_upsert_replaces_existing_record' verifies two aput calls to same key leave exactly one record with second version. Delete test 'test_delete_removes_from_get_and_search' verifies adelete results in aget returning None and asearch returning 0 matches. Both passed.

Test 'test_semantic_search_ranking_with_real_embeddings' was SKIPPED (not executed) because FLEET_MEMORY_EMBED_URL environment variable is not set. Test output: '15 passed, 1 skipped in 23.30s'. The criterion requires 'real nomic round-trip proven' — a skipped test is an absent oracle and proves nothing. While the test code is correctly written to use real nomic embeddings when available, actual execution did not occur, so the round-trip was not proven.

Three tests passed: (1) 'test_pool_lifecycle_no_connection_leak' verifies pg_stat_activity count restored after context exit (no leak), (2) 'test_store_setup_is_idempotent' verifies setup can run twice, (3) 'test_connection_timeout_behavior' verifies timeout against closed port with ASSUM-006 observation recorded in lines 107-151.

Test 'test_pool_pressure_concurrent_operations' (lines 172-237 of test_pool_lifecycle.py) passed. Sets pg_pool_max=10, launches 15 concurrent aput tasks, verifies all 15 complete within 30s bound. ASSUM-004 verified: psycopg-pool queues operations when pool is full; all complete successfully.

rationale: AC-004 cannot be verified because the semantic search ranking test with real nomic embeddings was skipped due to missing FLEET_MEMORY_EMBED_URL configuration. The criterion explicitly requires 'real nomic round-trip proven' — a skipped test does not prove execution occurred. Per absence-of-failure guard: 'an ABSENT or zero-cardinality oracle is NOT a pass.' Additionally, Turn 2 feedback on report hygiene (filtering orchestrator-managed paths from files_modified) was not addressed.
